function.message: Handled the next inbox item by running the requested OCR/frontmatter migration on eight finance records and deleting the processed inbox request.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed bootstrap and nested AGENTS rules, inspected 99_system before task work, used inbox-processing, OCR, migration, and finance schema docs, preserved original note bodies, kept canonical file paths, and deleted the inbox item only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request in 00_inbox/000_next-task.md explicitly asked for OCR processing of eight listed finance notes. Each target note visibly contained all required fields and line-item details required by 99_system/schemas/finance-record-frontmatter.md, so I added schema-compliant YAML frontmatter in place while preserving the existing body text as required by the OCR and migration workflows. After completing all requested updates, I deleted the processed inbox item per 00_inbox/AGENTS.MD and 99_system/workflows/process-next-inbox-item.md.
